_meta.description: Initial clue registry generated by Wave0. Categories per docs/clue-trigger-plan.md. No semantic rewrites yet.
notes: 7 dual-owners (crackles/arrhythmia/pulsus_paradoxus/icterus/petechiae/dehydration/anuria) currently owned by symptom_engine (Category A); exam-side occurrences are projection-only — Wave 1 will remove duplicate trigger rules from exam templates.
B-category owners set to "ranges_translators" — Wave 2 will move quantitative threshold ownership out of exam_templates.json.
Wave 4 (2026-06-11): suggested_tests is now the primary recommendation surface. diseases.json::clue_to_test has been removed.

Wave 1 (2026-06-11): 7 dual-owners resolved. 6 new Category C clues minted (crackles_auscultation/endoscopy, arrhythmia_auscultation, pulsus_paradoxus_blood_pressure, petechiae_inspection, dehydration_inspection). icterus + anuria exam-side rules deleted (symptom side covers).

Wave 2 (2026-06-11): 29 Category B clues migrated to specific range translators (vitals/blood_gas/chemistry/cbc/coag/urinalysis). vitals_ranges.json now declares clue_thresholds for each param. exam_templates.thresholds fields marked deprecate-Wave3. Runtime eval path unchanged.
Wave 4 bridge (2026-06-11): 7 deprecated diagnosis-only clue IDs remain registered as alias entries while disease clue lists finish migrating to canonical suffixed clue IDs.
Metadata refinement (2026-06-11): obvious measured abnormalities (T3_high, albumin_low, alt_high, ammonia_high, sodium_low, temp_low, cvp_high, cvp_low) reclassified from Category A to Category B.

Alias refinement (2026-06-11): pale_mucous_membranes, kussmaul_respiration, weak_pulse, weak_thready_pulse, and altered_consciousness are now explicit deprecated aliases of canonical symptom-layer clues.
